summary: Iteration 4 — tested all 4 new modules (Revision, Amendments, Medicines, Weather) + real-time Notifications end-to-end. Added 19 new pytest cases to backend_test.py (total 52, all passing in 27s). Frontend verified via Playwright across Dashboard sidebar, Revision (Claude summary+table+flashcards), Amendments (48 live items), Medicines (live search incl. fever/diabetes), Weather (Kathmandu + 7-day + persona switch), and NotificationBell (cross-user comment → badge=1 → panel opens → read-all clears unread).

ui_bugs.issue: Two elements share data-testid='notification-bell' on the dashboard (likely desktop + mobile versions), breaking strict-mode Playwright locators. One should be removed or renamed.

action_items: Deduplicate data-testid='notification-bell' (currently rendered twice in Dashboard.jsx top bar — keep one or split into notification-bell-desktop / notification-bell-mobile).

(Optional) Align data-testid naming with review spec: spec asked for nav-index/nav-health/nav-skill but implementation uses nav-home/nav-journal/nav-skills. Similarly spec asked amend-source-*/amend-search/medicine-item-* while code uses amend-src-*/amend-search-input/med-card-*. Functionality is unaffected.
(Optional) Add data-testid='revision-notes' on the notes textarea (currently relies on generic <textarea>) and explicit data-testid='med-item' alias for med-card-* to match documentation.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L859-869 — amendments cache key is process-global and ignores source/q filter params; OK because filtering happens after cache, but force=true also bypasses the 30-min cache and triggers 6 outbound RSS fetches per call (10s timeout each). A user spamming refresh can stack ~60s of upstream load. Consider rate-limiting force=true per IP or short-circuiting if last fetch < 30s.

server.py L702-706 — Revision fallback path produces flashcards by re-using sentences as both prompt and answer ('What is point N?' / sentence). Acceptable as graceful fallback but flag if Claude returns invalid JSON — user gets low-quality cards with no error indicator.
server.py L912-914 — startup hook on_event is deprecated in FastAPI ≥0.93 in favour of lifespan handlers; works but emits DeprecationWarning. Low priority.
Dashboard.jsx — NotificationBell mounted both in desktop and mobile top bars produces duplicate data-testid='notification-bell' (two visible/hidden instances). See ui_bugs above.
Weather.jsx — relies entirely on Open-Meteo with no API key & no retry; a transient 502 surfaces to the user without offline cache fallback. Consider 1-retry.
test_credentials: Bearer test_session_bissal_token (user test-user-bissal). Second user Bearer test_session_bissal_token_2 (test-user-bissal-2). Both work as session_token cookie.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates and cleans its own TEST_* data. Notification tests seed health posts, comment cross-user, then DELETE post in cleanup step. Some prior-run TEST_bell* notifications remain in collection (not affecting tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints all healthy: /api/revision/{generate,sessions,sessions/{id}/pdf}, /api/amendments?force=true&source=&q=, /api/medicines/search, /api/weather/{geocode,forecast}, /api/notifications/{,/{id}/read,/read-all}. Frontend testids actually present: revision-page, revision-generate, revision-summary, revision-table, revision-flashcards, revision-flashcard-N; amendments-page, amend-refresh, amend-sources, amend-src-{all,rbi,sebi,gst,income-tax,mca,icai}, amend-search-input, amend-search-btn, amend-list, amend-item-N; medicines-page, medicines-search, medicines-suggested, medicines-suggest-{name}, med-card-{uuid}; weather-page, weather-current, weather-daily, weather-persona-{farmer,student,commuter}; notification-bell (DUPLICATE), notification-badge, notification-panel, notification-read-all, notification-{id}. Sidebar nav keys: home, waste, water, tax, currency, revision, amendments, medicines, journal, weather, skills. Amendments returns >=48 items from Google News + SEBI RSS; first call ~8s — pass force=true and allow 12s.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs. Only hygiene: duplicate data-testid='notification-bell' breaks strict Playwright locators (must be resolved with .first or by deduping in code).
